nasb.text: Take double the money in your hand, and take back in your hand the money that was returned in the mouth of your sacks; perhaps it was a mistake.

esv.text: Take double the money with you. Carry back with you the money that was returned in the mouth of your sacks. Perhaps it was an oversight.

cnv.text: 你們手裡要多帶一倍銀子，因為你們要把那放回在你們袋口裡的銀子帶回去，那可能是弄錯了的。

ccb.text: 你们还要带双倍的钱，好归还上次留在你们口袋中的钱，那可能是弄错了。

csbs.text: 你们手中要拿上双倍的银子，亲手带回那归还在你们袋子口的银子，那或许是个失误。
